title: Bleu_2ay's Ghast Model
description: A texture pack that changes the model of the Ghast!
body:
A resource pack that gives Ghasts a more modern style design.

They now have a more elongated head, more tentacles, and an improved texture with a larger pixel density. 

Requires Entity Model Features mod to work, though it could also run with Optifine.

Design and model: [Bleu_2ay on Twitter](https://x.com/Bleu_2ay)

Author: [ALtheGatorMC on Twitter](https://x.com/ALtheGatorMC)
